---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem or unmet need.

**What would the solution look like?**
Describe how you'd want it to work.

**Which part of Sage does this affect?**
- [ ] Navigator / orchestration
- [ ] A specific skill (which one?)
- [ ] Setup / installation
- [ ] Platform integration (Antigravity / Claude Code)
- [ ] Project state (.sage/)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.
